transcript:
CALLER: Uh hello. Aapka clinic government employees ke liye CGHS empanelled hai kya?
AGENT: Haan ji, hum CGHS empanelled hain. Central government employees aur unke dependents cashless services le sakte hain.
CALLER: Aur CGHS card se OPD bhi cover hoga ya sirf IPD?
AGENT: CGHS ke through OPD consultations bhi cover hote hain empanelled hospitals mein. Aapko apna CGHS card aur beneficiary ID card laana hoga.
CALLER: Specialist ke liye referral chahiye kya?
AGENT: CGHS ke norms ke anusaar, specialist ke liye CGHS dispensary se referral recommended hai. Please apne dispensary se confirm kar lein pehle — har case alag ho sakta hai.
CALLER: Theek hai, shukriya aapka.
AGENT: Koi bhi aur sawaal ho toh call karein. Aapka swagat hai.
